programme.desc: השידורים יתחדשו בקרוב.

programme.title: הקופסונים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה המועמדת לאוסקר עבור סרט האנימציה הטוב ביותר. יתום שגדל עם חבורה יוצאת דופן של "אוספי אשפה" חייב להציל את חבריו ממדביר מרושע, בעזרת ילדה שפגש. דיבוב: פלג רנד, מיכאל הנגבי. בימוי: גרהאם אנאבל, אנתוני סטצ'י. 2014.

programme.title: הקרקס של טורו (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה שובת לב. תרנגולת שאינה מסוגלת להטיל ביצים וניחנת במראה יוצא דופן, פוגשת בבעלת חווה קשישה, ומגלה כשרונות חבויים - להבין ולדבר עם בני אדם ולשיר בקול מרהיב. במאים: אדוארדו גונדל, ויקטור מוניוט. ספרד, 2019. כ' עב'.

programme.title: דגים נגד תרנגולות (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. יוליוס הוא כריש רעב שאוהב דגים- כחברים. חבריו חוששים מהיום שבו יהיה רעב באמת ועולים ליבשה כדי לתפוס עבורו תרנגולות. אך הם מגלים את בני האדם- שאוכלים דגים. דיבוב: דון לני-גבאי, תמיר ורדי. במאי: ג'ו-אן הו. 2011. כ' עב'.

programme.title: 200% זאב (מדובב)
programme.desc: פרדי הפודל הגיבור חוזר בענק, והפעם נותן 200% מעצמו! הפעם מנסה פרדי להוביל את להקת אנשי הזאב, אך לא מצליח לזכות בכבוד של חבריו. האם הוא יצליח להוכיח לעצמו ולכל השאר שהוא 200% זאב? דיבוב: יובל חופי, נירית מיליס. 2024. כ' עב'.

programme.title: מדגסקר: מקרקסים את אירופה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מדובבת לעברית. אלכס, מרטי, גלוריה ומלמן החיות האהובות חוזרים בהרפתקה חדשה והפעם הם מצטרפים לקרקס בכדי לחזור לגן החיות שלהם בניו יורק. במאי: קונראד ורנון, אריק דארנל, וטום מק'גארת'. 2012. כ' עב'.

programme.title: הקרודים 2: עידן חדש (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית המשך לשובר הקופות. משפחת הקרודים הפרה-היסטורית מחפשת מקום חדש להקים את ביתם. במהלך החיפושים הם מגיעים למקום קסום, אך מגלים כי המקום כבר משמש בית למשפחה אחרת, ומתקדמת יותר. דיבוב עב': דיקלה הדר. 2020. כ' עב'.

programme.title: להציל את דינו - חבר מעולם אחר (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאה מהנה לכל המשפחה. נער הרפתקני מתיידד עם דינוזאור חביב ומנסה לעזור לו לברוח מהמדען המרושע שתפס אותו כדי לערוך עליו ניסויים. עם: קיילר צ'רלס בק, בן הול. במאי: ריאן בלגארדט. ארה"ב, 2019. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: חבורת המערב הפרוע (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאה מלאת אקשן, אומץ ורגש! שני אחים יוצאים להרפתקה מרהיבה ברחבי ארה"ב כדי למצוא את דודם. בדרך הם פוגשים חברים חדשים, נתקלים בשודדים ואינדיאנים, ומגלים עולמות מפתיעים. במאי: פדרו סוליס. ספרד, 2024. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: קורליין ודלת הקסמים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. דלת קסמים מובילה את קורליין לגרסה אלטרנטיבית של חייה- רק טובה יותר. כאשר ההרפתקה הופכת למסוכנת קורליין צריכה תושייה, נחישות ואומץ כדי להציל את משפחתה. דיבוב: לורן סביר, דן קיזלר. במאי: הנרי סליק. ארה"ב, 2009.

programme.title: ראמבל
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. בעולם בו מפלצות ובני אדם חיים זה לצד זה, מאמצת לעצמה נערה צעירה מפלצת חביבה בשם סטיב במטרה להפוך אותו לאלוף אולימפי בהיאבקות המפלצות המסורתית. דיבוב: ויל ארנט. במאי: האמיש גריב. 2021.

programme.title: קונג פו פנדה 2
programme.desc: קונג פו פנדה חוזר להרפתקה חדשה. פו מצטרף לקבוצה חדשה של לוחמי קונג-פו כדי לחסל אויב ותיק עם נשק קטלני, כשבמקביל עליו להתמודד עם סודות הקשורים למשפחתו. דיבוב: ג'ק בלאק, אנג'לינה ג'ולי. 2011.

programme.title: תעלול של משלוח (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. המשך ללהיט "תעלול של טיול". צמד החברים מהג'ונגל, הדוב מיק מיק ואוסקר הארנב יוצאים להרפתקה מסמרת שיער בכדור פורח, כדי לאתר את הוריו של גור דוב גריזלי קטן ונטוש. דיבוב עב': אמנון וולף, אור דגן. 2022.(n)

programme.title: 200% זאב (מדובב)
programme.desc: פרדי הפודל הגיבור חוזר בענק, והפעם נותן 200% מעצמו! הפעם מנסה פרדי להוביל את להקת אנשי הזאב, אך לא מצליח לזכות בכבוד של חבריו. האם הוא יצליח להוכיח לעצמו ולכל השאר שהוא 200% זאב? דיבוב: יובל חופי, נירית מיליס. 2024. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: גיבורה בהפתעה-טובים ה-2 מן האחד (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה, המשך עלילותיה של מגי הוומבטית הגיבורה. שנה לאחר שהפכה לגיבורה, כעת על מגי וסוויטי לשלב כוחות יחד ולהציל את העיר לאחר שגאון טכנולוגי מרושע מאיים ללכוד את כולם במציאות מדומה "משולמת". דיבוב עב': עדי ארד. 2023.(n)

programme.title: קורליין ודלת הקסמים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. דלת קסמים מובילה את קורליין לגרסה אלטרנטיבית של חייה- רק טובה יותר. כאשר ההרפתקה הופכת למסוכנת קורליין צריכה תושייה, נחישות ואומץ כדי להציל את משפחתה. דיבוב: לורן סביר, דן קיזלר. במאי: הנרי סליק. ארה"ב, 2009.(n)

programme.title: לא רעים בכלל (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מדליקה מבית דרימוורקס, ע"פ סדרת הספרים המצליחה. הזאב הרע וחבריו נתפסים על חם בעת ביצוע שוד, אך במקום ללכת לכלא הם מסכימים לעבור שיקום. האם הרעים הגדולים ביותר יכולים להפוך לטובים? דיבוב עב'. 2022. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: אי הפאפינים - חברים חדשים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מקסימה המבוססת על סדרת הילדים המצליחה. כאשר ביצה קטנה נעלמת מאי תוכי הים, אונה וחבריה החדשים יוצאים למסע כנגד הזמן לאתר אותה ולהביאה חזרה אל האי. דיבוב עב': יובל בלכרוביץ', סיון תם. במאי: ג'רמי פרסל. 2023.(n)

programme.title: דגים נגד תרנגולות (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. יוליוס הוא כריש רעב שאוהב דגים- כחברים. חבריו חוששים מהיום שבו יהיה רעב באמת ועולים ליבשה כדי לתפוס עבורו תרנגולות. אך הם מגלים את בני האדם- שאוכלים דגים. דיבוב: דון לני-גבאי, תמיר ורדי. במאי: ג'ו-אן הו. 2011. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: נורם בעיר הגדולה 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. דב הקוטב המדבר חוזר בהרפתקה חדשה! והפעם נורם מגיע לניו יורק והופך מגיבור למבוקש. במקביל עליו להציל את הקוטב מפני חברה המתכננת להפוך את הקרח לבקבוקי מים מינרליים. דיבוב: אורי זלצמן. במאי: טים מלטבי. 2018. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: הדרקון הראשון שלי (לייב אקשן) מדובב
programme.desc: עיבוד לייב-אקשן חדש ומרהיב של סרט האנימציה משנת 2010. נער ויקינגי מתיידד עם דרקון נדיר, ויחד הם יוצאים למסע אמיץ שמשנה את גורל השבט שלהם. עם: מייסון תיימס, ניקו פארקר, ג'רארד באטלר. במאי: דין דבלואה. ארה"ב, 2025. מדובב לעב'.(n)

programme.desc: הרפתקאה מהנה לכל המשפחה. נער הרפתקני מתיידד עם דינוזאור חביב ומנסה לעזור לו לברוח מהמדען המרושע שתפס אותו כדי לערוך עליו ניסויים. עם: קיילר צ'רלס בק, בן הול. במאי: ריאן בלגארדט. ארה"ב, 2019. מדובב לעב'.(n)

programme.title: בית ספר לחיות מדברות (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאות, המשך ללהיט 'סוד החיות הקסומות'. החיות המיוחדות שיודעות לדבר חוזרות, והפעם הן עוזרות לתלמידי ביה"ס להתגבר על הפחדים שלהם לקראת טקס סיום הלימודים, ועל הדרך לפתור תעלומה נוספת. דיבוב עב': בר מיניאלי, שילה שהם. 2022.(n)

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
A Mistake
programme.desc: A talented surgeon's life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Medical drama, starring Elizabeth Banks, Simon McBurney and Joel Tolbeck.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFK's legacy. Director Pablo Larrain's Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score.(n)

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A talented surgeon's life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Medical drama, starring Elizabeth Banks, Simon McBurney and Joel Tolbeck.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.(n)

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwick's period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.(n)

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: Three former opera singers prepare for their annual concert to mark Verdi's birthday and raise funds for their retirement home. However, this year, a famous diva has joined the group, and her history with the others threatens the performance. Comedy drama, directed by Dustin Hoffman and starring Maggie Smith, Billy Connolly, Tom Courtenay, Pauline Collins and Michael Gambon.(n)

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFK's legacy. Director Pablo Larrain's Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score.(n)

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner.(n)

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwick's period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas.(n)

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: When a solitary writer adopts and bonds with a Great Dane that belonged to a late friend, she begins to come to terms with her past and her own creative inner life. Drama based on the novel by Sigrid Nunez, starring Naomi Watts and Bill Murray.(n)

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.(n)

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.(n)

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcott's novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst.(n)

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbet's drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn.(n)

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: Small business owner Hope Goldman performs facials to celebrity clientele and powerful businesswomen. She is poised to launch her own skincare line, but is in arrears with rent on her store at a shopping complex. A rival called Angel opens in close proximity and soon after, her email is hacked and tyres slashed. Hope is convinced that Angel is the culprit and enlists hired thug Armen and young beau Jordan to extinguish the competition. Director Austin Peters' thriller, starring Elizabeth Banks and Lewis Pullman.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: When a solitary writer adopts and bonds with a Great Dane that belonged to a late friend, she begins to come to terms with her past and her own creative inner life. Drama based on the novel by Sigrid Nunez, starring Naomi Watts and Bill Murray.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcott's novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: Fact-based drama chronicling Brian Clough's ill-fated 44-day tenure as boss of Leeds United in 1974, after Don Revie's departure for the job of England's manager. Following his acrimonious split from Derby County and a brief spell at Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion, Clough arrived at Elland Road on a wave of controversy, after previously being an outspoken critic of the club, and struggled to find allies among the playing staff. With Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall, Jim Broadbent and Colm Meaney.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance.

programme.title: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in a Brooklyn neighbourhood on the hottest day of the summer. The simmering conflicts centre on the Italian-owned local pizza parlour, as a minor dispute gradually escalates into full-blown violence. Drama, directed by and starring Spike Lee, with Danny Aiello, John Turturro, Ossie Davis, Rosie Perez and Samuel L Jackson.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Baker's Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married

Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers' group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornby's novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.(n)

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: Riley, a young woman recently released from rehab, meets Ethan and finds herself navigating the line between love and a new addiction. Director Brittany Snow's romantic comedy drama, starring Courtney Eaton, Thomas Mann and Dave Bautista.(n)

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian struggling with PTSD agonises over whether or not to join the search for a missing teenage girl she used to look after. Writer-director Ally Pankiw's comedy drama, starring Rachel Sennott and Olga Petsa.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.(n)

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.(n)

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A grizzled drifter rescues a nun from a gang of rapists and gets roped into escorting her across the Mexican desert. He gradually realises there is more to his new companion than meets the eye - and she may be hiding a surprising secret. Don Siegel's Western, starring Clint Eastwood, Shirley MacLaine, Manolo Fabregas, Alberto Morin and John Kelly.(n)

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.(n)

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.(n)

programme.title: The Gentleman
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman.(n)

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu.(n)

programme.title: Icefall
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover he's aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene.(n)

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents' basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed.(n)

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler.(n)

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey.(n)

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Laura's home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins.(n)

programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmi's thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia.(n)

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan.(n)

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal.

programme.title: King Ivory
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the city's criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents' basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: When a young girl's sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worley's fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and D'Arcy Carden.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents' basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey.

programme.title: Icefall
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover he's aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Laura's home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: The Gentleman
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan.

programme.title: Storms of the Century
programme.desc: Looking back at some of the worst hurricanes starting with a storm that changed New Orleans, and the country, forever - Hurricane Katrina; hosted by Al Roker.","large":"Since the turn of the millennium, we're seeing deadly and destructive hurricanes slam into the U-S, leaving an unimaginable toll. "Once-in-a-century" storms are now becoming recurring events. Over the next 30 minutes, we are looking back at some of the worst hurricanes starting with a storm that changed New Orleans, and the country, forever - Hurricane Katrina. Hosted by Al Roker.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Against all odds, a young woman is found alive after an attack on her and a friend near Corpus Christi, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman's story about an abduction and murder helps reopen a decades-old case that has weighed heavy on a New York town.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As Hurricane Charley ravages a small town in Florida, a man trying to avoid his past hides out in a hotel room.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A love triangle leads to years of stalking, property destruction, threats, and murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young art student from Texas is found murdered in her bed with no sign of forced entry, indicating that she knew her killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mystery of a successful real estate entrepreneur killed by a car bomb spans nearly two decades.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When an Iowa woman is attacked while home alone with her three children, the confrontation turns deadly.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman comes forward with the truth about the deaths of three other women, solving a 17-year-old mystery; interviews with two people at the center of the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young father in California calls 911 after being in a shootout in a car full of strangers that injures two people and kills another.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old woman goes missing from a shopping mall in Plano, Texas, her family searches for her, and the police seek out who is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A powerful crime kingpin hosts a martial arts tournament on his island lair. A former Shaolin monk is recruited by an intelligence agency to enter the tournament and expose the crime lord's opium and slavery rings. He finds himself fighting for his life alongside two Vietnam veterans who are both fleeing their own enemies. Thriller, starring Bruce Lee, John Saxon, Jim Kelly and Kien Shih.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-March 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varley's comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic Wes

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Dann

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook

Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varley's comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic Wes

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entity's human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bourne's long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Green

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitler's plans for world domination - aided by Jones's deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul F

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures' fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors' safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Shooter

programme.title: White Elephant
programme.desc: An ex-Marine enforcer must battle his conscience and code of honour when he is forced to work for the Mob. Action thriller directed by Jesse V Johnson, starring Bruce Willis, Olga Kurylenko, John Malkovich and Michael Rooker.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teacher's son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum

programme.title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop delves into the murky world of international arms theft to track down a missing nuclear warhead - but the bad guys try to get him out of the way by framing him for murder. Martial arts adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jackson Lou, Annie Wu, Bill Tung and Jouri Petrov. In Mandarin, Cantonese, English, Russian and Ukrainian.

programme.title: Constantine
programme.desc: Exorcist John Constantine is cursed with the ability to see spirits stalking the Earth, and grudgingly takes on the forces of evil, hoping his actions will earn him a place in heaven. However, he is told he has terminal cancer and time for salvation is running out - unless a policewoman investigating her twin sister's death can find the key to saving his soul. Supernatural thriller, starring Keanu

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater enemy. programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Maverick cop John Spartan is frozen alive in 1996 and held in cryonic suspension for a crime he did not commit. Decades into the future, the dictator of a seemingly utopian city unleashes a criminal psychopath against his political enemy - but he proves impossible to control, forcing the authorities to revive Spartan to defeat him. Sci-fi thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bu

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristo

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-March 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teacher's son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: When three different animals become infected with a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop them from destroying Chicago. Fantasy adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Naomie Harris and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop delves into the murky world of international arms theft to track down a missing nuclear warhead - but the bad guys try to get him out of the way by framing him for murder. Martial arts adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jackson Lou, Annie Wu, Bill Tung and Jouri Petrov. In Mandarin, Cantonese, English, Russian and Ukrainian.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniac's trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Miller's action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Maverick cop John Spartan is frozen alive in 1996 and held in cryonic suspension for a crime he did not commit. Decades into the future, the dictator of a seemingly utopian city unleashes a criminal psychopath against his political enemy - but he proves impossible to control, forcing the authorities to revive Spartan to defeat him. Sci-fi thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bu

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of meta-humans to stand against supervillain Steppenwolf, but despite the help of Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash, it may already be too late to save the p

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: An apparently unassuming man finds someone very important to him has been scammed and driven to harm. Revealed as a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as 'Beekeepers', he sets out on a brutal quest of vengeance, hunting those responsible for the incident, who have seriously underestimated how much of a threat he is. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Iro

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristo

programme.desc: Dave Seville, the Chipmunks and the Chipettes are taking a luxury cruise to the International Music Awards. programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward,

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: Fay Grim
programme.desc: Many years after her notorious husband, Henry Fool, fled after killing a neighbor, Fay Grim (Parker Posey) receives a visit from CIA agent Fulbright (Jeff Goldblum), who tells her that Henry is dead, but that some of his journals have been unearthed in France. She sets forth on a globe-trotting odyssey that soon leads to the discovery that he is alive, and his journals are more than they appear to

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Seen & Heard: the History of Black Television
programme.desc: Detailing decades of cultural shifts in television, with prominent Black voices sharing stories of their journeys, inspirations, and insights into their work and the industry.

programme.title: Seen & Heard: the History of Black Television
programme.desc: The responsibility and power of storytelling is demonstrated in Shonda Rhimes' color-blind casting for her powerhouse shows, Oprah betting on herself, and other stories depicting the breath of the Black experience.

programme.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
programme.desc: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

programme.title: 100-Foot Wave

programme.title: 100-Foot Wave
programme.desc: Garrett's wipeout leaves him seriously injured; CJ Macias gets back on a board after recovering from his own accident; Chumbo reflects on his surfing priorities; after Justine and Tony make a difficult decision, a tragedy strikes NazarÃ©.

programme.title: 100-Foot Wave
programme.desc: Garrett, Nicole, Cotty, Justine, Chumbo and Nic set out on an overnight boat to Cortes Bank, an unusual and legendary surf spot in the open ocean 100 miles off the coast of San Diego, when a rare swell appears.

programme.title: 100-Foot Wave
programme.desc: Top surfers from around the world flock to O'ahu for the prestigious Eddie Aikau Big Wave Invitational when the event is called for the first time in seven years; Garrett is not invited to participate; everyone celebrates the unexpected winner.

programme.title: 100-Foot Wave
programme.desc: Following the Eddie, the McNamara's move to Italy for a fresh start; just as Garrett begins to slow down in his new life away from the ocean, he hears of a perfect swell off the coast of Morocco and can't resist.

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Fay Grim
programme.desc: Many years after her notorious husband, Henry Fool, fled after killing a neighbor, Fay Grim (Parker Posey) receives a visit from CIA agent Fulbright (Jeff Goldblum), who tells her that Henry is dead, but that some of his journals have been unearthed in France. programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod

programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod

programme.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
programme.desc: In 2013, a newspaper exposÃ© once again links Alex Rodriguez to performance-enhancing drugs, triggering Major League Baseball's longest-ever PED suspension and a storm of public hostility.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

programme.desc: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. programme.title: NWSL: The Final Third
programme.desc: Lo'eau LaBonta and the KC Current dance to the top of the standings, while the Washington Spirit welcome Rodman back from injury. Rookie sensation Riley Tiernan and Angel City face playoff elimination.

programme.title: NWSL: The Final Third
programme.desc: Angel City plan their future without recently retired soccer players Christen Press and Ali Riley; with Trinity Rodman sidelined by injury, Esme Morgan and the Spirit seek playoff redemption; the top seed KC Current are pushed to the limit against eight-seed Gotham FC.

programme.title: NWSL: The Final Third
programme.desc: All roads lead to the NWSL championship as the Washington Spirit and Gotham FC deliver an epic finale. Spirit midfielder Hal Hershfelt reflects on her journey. Kansas City looks to the future after a heartbreaking loss. Angel City's Tiernan heads to the NWSL Awards as a Rookie of the Year finalist.
